AssertionError: Submit button is still disabled after filling amount
assert not True
 +  where True = is_disabled()
 +    where is_disabled = <Locator frame=<Frame name= url='https://app.demo.ufarm.digital/marketplace/pool/6ad86620-2fa9-4c18-a1fd-20ab8cc0edaa'> selector='#poolDepositConfirm'>.is_disabled
 +      where <Locator frame=<Frame name= url='https://app.demo.ufarm.digital/marketplace/pool/6ad86620-2fa9-4c18-a1fd-20ab8cc0edaa'> selector='#poolDepositConfirm'> = submit_button()
 +        where submit_button = <core.ui.pages.deposit_modal.DepositModal object at 0x7f4b82dcbf50>.submit_button
MAX button fills input with wallet on-chain balance
